rationale.R1.4: Maps against nearest works and identifies specific deltas, meeting the highest anchor.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations but doesn't audit comprehensively.
rationale.RX.1: Marks uncertainty for each recommendation appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids new errors and identifies original harms.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major changes, minor edits not annotated.
